r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Clogged arteries require bypass surgery or angioplasty
emotional_amplifiers: There's a little known secret that many pharmaceutical companies and doctors hope you never discover.
Pharmaceutical companies and doctors hope you never discover this
specificity_elements: Amino acid discovery dissolves plaque in arteries, restores youthful blood flow and energy

unique_differentiators: An amino acid in baby food can dissolve plaque and cancel surgery

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Cancel surgery, add 20 years to life, restore youthful blood flow

headline.primary_headline: A 'Miracle' Discovered by the US Navy Could Flush Your Arteries Clean Of All Life-Threatening Arterial Plaque
headline.subheadline: Amino acid discovery dissolves plaque in arteries, restores youthful blood flow and energy
headline.promise_compression: Navy-discovered compound cleans arteries of deadly plaque

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What is this Navy discovery? How does it work?

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Clogged arteries require surgery or lifetime medications
schema_analysis.new_schema: An amino acid can dissolve and flush plaque naturally
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: US Navy origin + Nobel Prize scientist + FDA safety approval

headline.vsl_adaptation: In the 1940s, the US Navy accidentally discovered something that could add 20 years to your life...

lead.opening_verbatim: LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA - There's a little known secret that many pharmaceutical companies and doctors hope you never discover. It concerns the existence of a safe but obscure amino acid that, when taken in pill form, could actually scrub and clean out harmful plaque from the human circulatory system.
lead.transition_to_body: In the process, it could remove years of built-up, life-threatening plaque...

mechanism.mechanism_description: EDTA (ethylene diamine tetraacetic acid) is an amino acid that scours blood vessels from micro-capillaries to major arteries, dissolving and eliminating plaque blockages. Originally used by Navy for heavy metal removal, it was discovered to also clean arteries through vasodilation and plaque binding.
mechanism.safety_claim: 100% safe as a food additive by both the FDA and USDA - found in soft drinks, cosmetics, and baby food

proof_elements.verbatim: In the 1940s, the US Navy began using EDTA
Two-time Nobel Prize-winning scientist Dr. Linus Pauling
FDA approved it as the leading treatment for heavy metal poisoning
proven in more than 1,820 medical studies
found in soft drinks, cosmetics, and even baby food

key_sections.content_verbatim: In the 1940s, the US Navy began using EDTA to remove dangerous levels of metals and toxins from the circulatory systems of sailors. It worked so well and with such a high degree of safety that the US Food and Drug Administration approved it as the leading treatment for heavy metal poisoning.
But doctors noted a curious side effect: the sailors' cardiovascular health had improved. Their blood vessels were inexplicably freer of blockages.

Two-time Nobel Prize-winning scientist Dr. Linus Pauling was the first to discover that EDTA was not only a powerful way to eliminate heavy metals and poisons from the body, but also flush away dangerous deposits of plaque that stick to the inner walls of arteries.

testimonials.quote: My heart surgery may be a thing of the past. Advanced EDTA Mega Plus actually made my blockage disappear. My angioplasty has been postponed indefinitely. My doctor couldn't believe his eyes!
My cholesterol dropped to 160 points. I credit it to EDTA.
My blood pressure has dropped, I no longer have chest pains, and the numbness is gone.

narrative_flow.urine_test_proof: 10-Day Test: Compare urine samples before and after - white powder visible is plaque removed from circulatory system

offer.company: Miracle Breakthrough Labs, Coral Gables, Florida

metadata.source_file: A Miracle Discovered by the US Navy 2010-2018 (3 Stars) Strong Print Ad.md

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Strong origin marketing with exceptional proof stacking
notable_elements: Linus Pauling association (though controversial in medical circles)
The 'baby food' safety proof is clever normalization
Disclaimer notes scenarios 'changed, modified or fictionalized'
extraction_notes.key_insight: The 'curious side effect' narrative makes the discovery feel accidental and therefore more authentic - it wasn't designed, it was discovered
